initial_candidates.sql:
WITH ordered_geolocation AS (
    SELECT 
        geolocation_state,
        geolocation_city,
        geolocation_zip_code_prefix,
        geolocation_lat,
        geolocation_lng,
        LAG(geolocation_lat) OVER (ORDER BY geolocation_state, geolocation_city, geolocation_zip_code_prefix, geolocation_lat, geolocation_lng) AS prev_lat,
        LAG(geolocation_lng) OVER (ORDER BY geolocation_state, geolocation_city, geolocation_zip_code_prefix, geolocation_lat, geolocation_lng) AS prev_lng,
        LAG(geolocation_state) OVER (ORDER BY geolocation_state, geolocation_city, geolocation_zip_code_prefix, geolocation_lat, geolocation_lng) AS prev_state,
        LAG(geolocation_city) OVER (ORDER BY geolocation_state, geolocation_city, geolocation_zip_code_prefix, geolocation_lat, geolocation_lng) AS prev_city
    FROM olist_geolocation
),
distances AS (
    SELECT 
        geolocation_state,
        geolocation_city,
        geolocation_zip_code_prefix,
        geolocation_lat,
        geolocation_lng,
        prev_state,
        prev_city,
        CASE 
            WHEN prev_lat IS NULL OR prev_lng IS NULL THEN NULL
            ELSE 6371 * 2 * ASIN(SQRT(
                POWER(SIN((RADIANS(geolocation_lat) - RADIANS(prev_lat)) / 2), 2) +
                COS(RADIANS(prev_lat)) * COS(RADIANS(geolocation_lat)) *
                POWER(SIN((RADIANS(geolocation_lng) - RADIANS(prev_lng)) / 2), 2)
            ))
        END AS distance_km
    FROM ordered_geolocation
)
SELECT 
    prev_state || ' - ' || prev_city || ' → ' || geolocation_state || ' - ' || geolocation_city AS consecutive_cities
FROM distances
WHERE distance_km IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY distance_km DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH ordered_geolocation AS (
    SELECT 
        geolocation_state,
        geolocation_city,
        geolocation_zip_code_prefix,
        geolocation_lat,
        geolocation_lng,
        LAG(geolocation_lat) OVER (ORDER BY geolocation_state, geolocation_city, geolocation_zip_code_prefix, geolocation_lat, geolocation_lng) AS prev_lat,
        LAG(geolocation_lng) OVER (ORDER BY geolocation_state, geolocation_city, geolocation_zip_code_prefix, geolocation_lat, geolocation_lng) AS prev_lng,
        LAG(geolocation_state) OVER (ORDER BY geolocation_state, geolocation_city, geolocation_zip_code_prefix, geolocation_lat, geolocation_lng) AS prev_state,
        LAG(geolocation_city) OVER (ORDER BY geolocation_state, geolocation_city, geolocation_zip_code_prefix, geolocation_lat, geolocation_lng) AS prev_city
    FROM olist_geolocation
),
distances AS (
    SELECT 
        geolocation_state,
        geolocation_city,
        geolocation_zip_code_prefix,
        geolocation_lat,
        geolocation_lng,
        prev_state,
        prev_city,
        CASE 
            WHEN prev_lat IS NOT NULL AND prev_lng IS NOT NULL THEN
                6371 * 2 * ASIN(SQRT(
                    POWER(SIN((RADIANS(geolocation_lat) - RADIANS(prev_lat)) / 2), 2) +
                    COS(RADIANS(prev_lat)) * COS(RADIANS(geolocation_lat)) *
                    POWER(SIN((RADIANS(geolocation_lng) - RADIANS(prev_lng)) / 2), 2)
                ))
            ELSE NULL
        END AS distance_km
    FROM ordered_geolocation
)
SELECT 
    prev_city || ' -> ' || geolocation_city AS consecutive_cities
FROM distances
WHERE distance_km IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY distance_km DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT t2.geolocation_city AS city1, t3.geolocation_city AS city2
FROM (
    SELECT 
        geolocation_state, 
        geolocation_city, 
        geolocation_zip_code_prefix, 
        geolocation_lat, 
        geolocation_lng,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY geolocation_state, geolocation_city, geolocation_zip_code_prefix, geolocation_lat, geolocation_lng) AS rn
    FROM olist_geolocation
) t2
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        geolocation_state, 
        geolocation_city, 
        geolocation_zip_code_prefix, 
        geolocation_lat, 
        geolocation_lng,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY geolocation_state, geolocation_city, geolocation_zip_code_prefix, geolocation_lat, geolocation_lng) AS rn
    FROM olist_geolocation
) t3 ON t3.rn = t2.rn + 1
ORDER BY 
    6371 * 2 * ASIN(SQRT(
        POW(SIN((RADIANS(t3.geolocation_lat) - RADIANS(t2.geolocation_lat)) / 2), 2) +
        COS(RADIANS(t2.geolocation_lat)) * COS(RADIANS(t3.geolocation_lat)) *
        POW(SIN((RADIANS(t3.geolocation_lng) - RADIANS(t2.geolocation_lng)) / 2), 2)
    )) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH ordered_geolocation AS (
    SELECT 
        geolocation_state,
        geolocation_city,
        geolocation_zip_code_prefix,
        geolocation_lat,
        geolocation_lng,
        LAG(geolocation_state) OVER (ORDER BY geolocation_state, geolocation_city, geolocation_zip_code_prefix, geolocation_lat, geolocation_lng) AS prev_state,
        LAG(geolocation_city) OVER (ORDER BY geolocation_state, geolocation_city, geolocation_zip_code_prefix, geolocation_lat, geolocation_lng) AS prev_city,
        LAG(geolocation_lat) OVER (ORDER BY geolocation_state, geolocation_city, geolocation_zip_code_prefix, geolocation_lat, geolocation_lng) AS prev_lat,
        LAG(geolocation_lng) OVER (ORDER BY geolocation_state, geolocation_city, geolocation_zip_code_prefix, geolocation_lat, geolocation_lng) AS prev_lng
    FROM olist_geolocation
),
distances AS (
    SELECT 
        geolocation_state,
        geolocation_city,
        geolocation_zip_code_prefix,
        geolocation_lat,
        geolocation_lng,
        prev_state,
        prev_city,
        prev_lat,
        prev_lng,
        CASE 
            WHEN prev_lat IS NULL OR prev_lng IS NULL THEN NULL
            ELSE 6371 * 2 * ASIN(SQRT(
                POWER(SIN((RADIANS(geolocation_lat) - RADIANS(prev_lat)) / 2), 2) +
                COS(RADIANS(prev_lat)) * COS(RADIANS(geolocation_lat)) *
                POWER(SIN((RADIANS(geolocation_lng) - RADIANS(prev_lng)) / 2), 2)
            ))
        END AS distance_km
    FROM ordered_geolocation
)
SELECT 
    prev_city || ' -> ' || geolocation_city AS consecutive_cities
FROM distances
WHERE distance_km IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY distance_km DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH ordered_geolocation AS (
    SELECT 
        geolocation_state,
        geolocation_city,
        geolocation_zip_code_prefix,
        geolocation_lat,
        geolocation_lng,
        LAG(geolocation_lat) OVER (ORDER BY geolocation_state, geolocation_city, geolocation_zip_code_prefix, geolocation_lat, geolocation_lng) AS prev_lat,
        LAG(geolocation_lng) OVER (ORDER BY geolocation_state, geolocation_city, geolocation_zip_code_prefix, geolocation_lat, geolocation_lng) AS prev_lng,
        LAG(geolocation_state) OVER (ORDER BY geolocation_state, geolocation_city, geolocation_zip_code_prefix, geolocation_lat, geolocation_lng) AS prev_state,
        LAG(geolocation_city) OVER (ORDER BY geolocation_state, geolocation_city, geolocation_zip_code_prefix, geolocation_lat, geolocation_lng) AS prev_city
    FROM olist_geolocation
),
distances AS (
    SELECT 
        geolocation_state,
        geolocation_city,
        geolocation_zip_code_prefix,
        geolocation_lat,
        geolocation_lng,
        prev_state,
        prev_city,
        CASE 
            WHEN prev_lat IS NULL THEN NULL
            ELSE 6371 * 2 * ASIN(SQRT(
                POW(SIN((RADIANS(geolocation_lat) - RADIANS(prev_lat)) / 2), 2) +
                COS(RADIANS(prev_lat)) * COS(RADIANS(geolocation_lat)) *
                POW(SIN((RADIANS(geolocation_lng) - RADIANS(prev_lng)) / 2), 2)
            ))
        END AS distance_km
    FROM ordered_geolocation
)
SELECT 
    prev_state || ' - ' || prev_city AS prev_city_full,
    geolocation_state || ' - ' || geolocation_city AS curr_city_full
FROM distances
WHERE distance_km IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY distance_km DESC
LIMIT 1;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT t2.geolocation_city AS city1, t3.geolocation_city AS city2
FROM (
    SELECT 
        geolocation_state, 
        geolocation_city, 
        geolocation_zip_code_prefix, 
        geolocation_lat, 
        geolocation_lng,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY geolocation_state, geolocation_city, geolocation_zip_code_prefix, geolocation_lat, geolocation_lng) AS rn
    FROM olist_geolocation
) t2
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        geolocation_state, 
        geolocation_city, 
        geolocation_zip_code_prefix, 
        geolocation_lat, 
        geolocation_lng,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY geolocation_state, geolocation_city, geolocation_zip_code_prefix, geolocation_lat, geolocation_lng) AS rn
    FROM olist_geolocation
) t3 ON t3.rn = t2.rn + 1
ORDER BY 
    6371 * 2 * ASIN(SQRT(
        POW(SIN((RADIANS(t3.geolocation_lat) - RADIANS(t2.geolocation_lat)) / 2), 2) +
        COS(RADIANS(t2.geolocation_lat)) * COS(RADIANS(t3.geolocation_lat)) *
        POW(SIN((RADIANS(t3.geolocation_lng) - RADIANS(t2.geolocation_lng)) / 2), 2)
    )) DESC
LIMIT 1;
